[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011110 4
1 0101000110 4
2 0000111000 3
3 1011100011 6
4 0101000111 5
5 0110111111 8
6 1011111111 9
7 0010101011 5

70 0000011000 2
